headline: Assessing Northrop Grumman (NOC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Recent performance snapshot Northrop Grumman (NOC) has drawn investor attention after a period where the stock fell about 26% over the past 3 months and is down roughly 2% over the past month. Against that share price performance, the company reports annual revenue of US$42.4b and net income of US$4.6b. Both revenue and net income reflect single digit annual growth rates based on the latest figures provided. See our latest analysis for Northrop Grumman. At a latest share price of US$540.81,...

headline: How Is RTX Expanding Missile Defense Production Capacity for Growth?
summary: RTX expands missile defense production and testing capacity as demand grows for advanced air and missile defense systems.

headline: Northrop Grumman Corporation (NOC)’s Jackal Completes Key Flight Test
summary: Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE:NOC) is among the 10 Best Aerospace and Defense Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On June 1, the defense contractor said it had completed a key flight test of its next-generation precision-strike missile, Jackal. According to the company’s press release, the assessment results confirmed the readiness of Jackal’s flight systems, with […]
